calibration_note: Role mappings and fit weights are editorial starting points over the currently registered CANDIDATE patterns. No binding here is measured Instagram performance; recalibrate only from real per-account results.

role_bindings.applicability_basis: Quote/reversal headline with a person photo was observed on news/issue-style covers; hypothesis_only (n=1), reference tier only.
Owner corrections require news and reported material to preserve the source form and factual boundary. This is CANDIDATE reference only, not measured performance.
Owner-directed account grammar requires news first frames to preserve the news account promise instead of reusing one universal cover.
Owner-approved CTA asks one immediate topic-specific question without forcing controversy or generic engagement copy.
Quote/reversal headline hook observed on issue/entertainment-style explore content; hypothesis_only (n=1), reference tier only.
Numbered curation list structure (repeated same-format items) was observed across humor/issue and lifestyle accounts; benchmark_observed (n=3), reference tier only.
Owner-directed story learning uses only the scenes needed for emotional progression and evidence. CANDIDATE reference only; no fixed slide count or performance claim.
Owner-directed fallback allows emotion-matched reaction media when direct topic media is sparse, while forbidding unrelated real people and factual-footage confusion.

Comment-keyword DM CTA is the only observed CTA pattern, but it carries manipulation_risk/funnel_risk flags and its own record forbids default use; the binder's role risk gate is expected to block it, leaving cta_strategy explicitly unavailable rather than silently bound.
Owner-approved CTA asks one colloquial topic-specific question and replaces the blocked DM-funnel mechanic as the safe reference guidance.

slide_count_hint_bindings.basis: Evidence shows repeated same-format list items with a variable item count; no measured slide-count distribution exists, so only variable-length support is asserted and no slide number is produced.
Owner correction explicitly rejects fixed slide counts. The hint asserts variable length only and produces no slide count or range.

role_bindings.applicability_basis: Owner-directed fashion and beauty first frames must communicate the account promise through the actual item, look, or trend rather than a universal news-style cover.
Owner-approved direction: introduce an item through available product, worn, angle, detail, styling, and information assets without forcing a fixed count. CANDIDATE reference only.
Owner-directed account grammar requires fashion/beauty first frames to preserve their own visual promise rather than reuse the news or story cover. CANDIDATE reference only.
Owner-approved CTA asks for an immediately answerable item, look, or preference choice without overstating editorial authority.

slide_count_hint_bindings.basis: The number of item views follows available useful media and information. No fixed slide number or measured distribution is asserted.

notes: Account ids and category vocabulary mirror config/source_intake_account_routing.json and config/source_intake_account_top_selection.json.
Only pattern ids that already exist in knowledge/patterns/pattern_registry.jsonl may appear in role_bindings; the binder verifies existence and never invents patterns.

All currently registered Instagram-learning patterns are CANDIDATE, so every possible binding today is reference_only and production_planning_eligible stays false until real promotion per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md.
account_c_beauty_fashion now has owner-corpus CANDIDATE reference bindings for item sequencing and account-specific first frames; these remain reference_only until promotion gates are met.

pattern.instagram_learning.content_pattern.regional_institution_notice_style and healthcare_public_character_illustration are intentionally unmapped: their observed contexts (regional/institutional notice accounts, hospital/public accounts) do not match any current account portfolio.

Every account now has an owner-corpus visual direction and direct low-friction CTA reference. These remain CANDIDATE guidance and are not represented as measured performance or PROMOTED production patterns.
